basic_details.job_title: ICAR NIFMD Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR National Institute on Foot and Mouth Disease
basic_details.short_information: ICAR National Institute on Foot and Mouth Disease (ICAR NIFMD) has released the official Young Professional II Notification 2026 at nifmd.icar.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ICAR-NIFMD Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 and 45 years with a Graduate degree in Agriculture Science/Technology with 1 year of research experience or a Master's degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, Agricultural Statistics, Biostatistics, Statistics, or equivalent can apply through email on or before 05-08-2026. The official notification PDF and appli

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Agriculture Science/Technology with 1 year research experience, Master's degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, Agricultural Statistics, Biostatistics, Statistics or equivalent
qualification.details: Graduate degree holders in Agriculture Science/Technology (includes all Agriculture & allied sciences, Animal Science, Veterinary science) with at least one year of relevant research experience as per ICAR guidelines. OR Master's degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, Agricultural Statistics, Biostatistics, Statistics, or an equivalent discipline from a recognized university.

selection_process: Screening of Applications Virtual Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR NIFMD Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR NIFMD Young Professional II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR NIFMD Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR NIFMD Young Professional-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR NIFMD Young Professional II Vacancy Details 2026
ICAR NIFMD Young Professional II Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduate degree holders in Agriculture Science/Technology (includes all Agriculture & allied sciences, Animal Science, Veterinary science) with at least one year of relevant research experience as per ICAR guidelines. OR Master's degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, Agricultural Statistics, Biostatistics, Statistics, or an equivalent discipline from a recognized university.

content_sections.heading: ICAR NIFMD Young Professional II Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR NIFMD Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR NIFMD Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR NIFMD Young Professional-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduate degree in Agriculture Science/Technology with 1 year of research experience, or a Master's degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, Agricultural Statistics, Biostatistics, Statistics, or an equivalent discipline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Young Professional-II.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of applications, followed by a virtual interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ICAR National Institute on Foot and Mouth Disease located?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 752050.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The tenure and other terms will be as per the contract agreement and ICAR guidelines.
